headline: Nvidia Is Fast Approaching Its 20-Day Moving Average. Is a Comeback Brewing?
summary: Nvidia stock inches higher as peace prospect triggers a tech-led market rally. Goldman Sachs explains what could drive NVDA shares much higher in 2026.

headline: Nvidia commits billions to Lumentum, Synopsys, Nokia, XAI, OpenAI, Intel in March alone
summary: CNBC just said something that caught my eye: “This month alone, Nvidia has committed $2 billion each to Lumentum, Coherent, before that $2 billion into Synopsys, a billion into Nokia, stakes in XAI, OpenAI and Intel.” That is an extraordinary amount of capital deployed in a single month, and it tells you exactly what Jensen ... Nvidia commits billions to Lumentum, Synopsys, Nokia, XAI, OpenAI, Intel in March alone

headline: A Look At Synopsys (SNPS) Valuation After New Arm AGI CPU Collaboration News
summary: Synopsys (SNPS) is back in focus after announcing a collaboration with Arm to support the new Arm AGI CPU, placing its design tools and IP at the center of custom silicon projects. See our latest analysis for Synopsys. The collaboration news lands while the 1 day share price return of 3.48% contrasts with a 90 day share price return decline of 15.59% and a 1 year total shareholder return decline of 9.05%. This suggests recent momentum has softened after a much stronger 5 year total...
